mapper.select: /* on.standard.systeminit.menu.selectMenuByUrl */ SELECT SMMH.DIV_CD , SMMH.MENU_SERNO , SMMH.MENU_CD , SMMH.UPR_MENU_CD , SMMH.KOR_NM , SMMH.MENU_PARAM , SMMH.LAY_OUT , SMMH.URL_ADDR , SMMH.SORT_NO , SMMH.USE_YN , SMMH.LEVEL , SMMH.SORT_PATH , SMMH.MENU_PATH , SMMH.MENU_CD_PATH FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY SMMH WHERE SMMH.URL_ADDR = #{pageUrl}
